title: THNDR — "Thunder" 3-oscillator (Robotron)
tldr: PLAY preset designed to evoke distant thunder — low-frequency oscillator dominant, with two slightly-detuned partials adding rumble. Uses `VEC*X` data of its own.
how: The three PLAY oscillators are configured at very low frequencies — close-to-DC waveforms that produce a sub-bass rumble rather than discrete pitches. Slight detuning between the three creates a slow beating effect that mimics thunder rolling.
watch: Spectrogram — energy concentrated in the low-frequency band.
All three oscillators audible but very close in pitch.
see: **SND2 / SND5 / SND16 / SND17** — other PLAY presets.
